best_fit_model.description: Name of model corresponding to best statistical fit of spectrum

cutoff_power_law.description: Fit parameters for Cutoff PowerLaw model

flux_error.description: 1-sigma uncertainty in flux in specified flux_unit

flux_unit.description: Units for the measured flux, default unit is [erg/cm2/s]

limiting_flux_sigma.description: Significance level [sigma] of the limiting flux. Default is 5 (5-sigma upper limit).

flux_spectral_band.description: Low and High energy bounds used in flux calculation (if not parsed in Reporter.schema)

flux_spectral_units.description: Units for the flux energy band (if not parsed in Reporter.schema), default is [keV]

flux_time_range.description: Start and stop time stamps used in flux calculation (if not parsed in DateTime.schema.json), measured since trigger [s]

flux_density.description: Flux density in the specified flux_density_unit

limiting_flux_density.description: Limiting flux density (upper limit) in flux_density_unit

limiting_flux_density_sigma.description: Significance level [sigma] of the limiting flux density. Default is 5 (5-sigma upper limit).

flux_density_unit.description: Unit of the flux density: frequency-based [erg/cm2/s/Hz], energy-based [erg/cm2/s/keV], or wavelength-based [erg/cm2/s/nm]. Default is [erg/cm2/s/keV].

flux_density_spectral_point.description: Flux density measured at a specific spectral point.

flux_density_reference_point_units.description: Unit of the flux density spectral point, default is [keV]

flux_density_time_range.description: Start and stop time stamps used in flux density calculation (if not parsed in DateTime.schema.json), measured since trigger [s]

fluence_spectral_band.description: Low and High energy bounds used in fluence calculation (if not parsed in Reporter.schema), default unit is [keV]

fluence_time_range.description: Start and stop time stamps used in fluence calculation (if not parsed in DateTime.schema), measured since trigger [s]
